entries.quote: What we did to high forex charges on cards way back in 2018 by introducing 'zero forex' cards, we will do the same to high forex charges on currency notes exchange in 2026 - i.e make it super transparent & affordable for consumers.
entries.signal: Niyo is expanding beyond forex cards into physical currency exchange with "Niyo Express" home delivery/pickup, positioning a direct competitive threat to traditional forex/currency exchange channels and travel money market.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Niyo sees forex exchange (physical + digital) as a core strategic lever with 2026 as execution year; betting on transparency and margin compression to disrupt incumbent forex players; investing in on-ground network (9 stores, target 50 branches) alongside digital platform
